name: Spam Denver Biscuit Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Separate the biscuits and place them in an ungreased 9-inch round cake pan, pressing them over the bottom to form a crust.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg yolks and cream cheese until smooth. Stir in the SPAM, shredded cheddar cheese, green bell pepper, onion, and paprika.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff; fold into the SPAM mixture.
5. Spoon the batter evenly over the crust.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Cut into wedges to serve.
